Contains exact CLI syntax, ndjson format requirements, and flag combinations that are easy to get wrong from memory. plugins.name: algobot-cli

Do NOT use for raw index ops (records, synonyms, settings) — use algolia-cli. Do NOT use for pure frontend search UI (InstantSearch, autocomplete) with no AI/agent layer.
